module.title: Guest order merge
module.description: Merge guest orders into authenticated customer accounts.

empty.title: No matching guest orders
empty.subline: There are no guest customer records using this account's email address.

actions.title: Verify and merge
actions.step1Title: 1. Send verification email to the customer
actions.step1Body: An email with a confirmation link and a one-time code will be sent to the account's email address.
actions.step2Body: Ask the customer to read the code from the email aloud, then enter it here to confirm and merge immediately.
actions.pendingNote: A confirmation email has already been sent. It expires at {expiresAt}.

directMerge.title: Trusted CSR direct merge
directMerge.warning: This bypasses email verification. Use only for customers whose identity is already established (long-standing relationship). All actions are logged with your user ID.
directMerge.confirm: Are you sure you want to merge guest orders without email verification? This action will be logged.
